scores.correctness_notes: Correctly explains the change/task model, statuses, and Python client methods (wait_change, get_change, ChangeError). Misses CLI (pebble changes/tasks), REST API endpoints (/v1/changes/{id}, /v1/changes/{id}/wait, ?select=in-progress), Notices mechanism (change-update), and state persistence to $PEBBLE/.pebble.state — all present in the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: container.pebble is not a public attribute on ops.Container (it's internal); the comment 'container.get_plan()  # or use self._get_pebble_client()' misattributes get_plan() as returning a client (it returns a Plan object). The underlying pebble.Client methods (wait_change, get_change, start_services, ChangeStatus, ChangeError) do exist. task.log is a plausible attribute but not confirmed in gold standard. Minor inaccuracies, not wholesale fabrication.
